title: City University of Hong Kong Generative AI Policy Evidence Draft - 2026-05-12
summary: Staged crawl found an official CityUHK GenAI guideline index page for teaching and learning, effective from Semester A 2025/26. Detailed staff/student PDFs redirected to SSO and several related official pages returned Incapsula WAF content to direct local fetches, so no broader student-use, assessment, academic-integrity, approved-tools, privacy, or research-guidance claims were approved in this run.
limitations: This report draft is based only on accessible public official source text captured on 2026-05-12.
Login-required SSO resources and hard-WAF-blocked pages were not accessed or used as evidence.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Staged claims are not human reviewed and must not be published as canonical claims without further review.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
